ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosting_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hosting provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the hosting provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hosting provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hosting provider */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Support email address of the hosting provider */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number of the hosting provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hosting provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hosting plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider offering the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the hosting plan */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the hosting plan */,
  "free_domain" INTEGER /* Whether the plan includes a free domain */,
  "free_ssl" INTEGER /* Whether the plan includes a free SSL certificate */,
  "one_click_wp" INTEGER /* Whether the plan includes 1-click WordPress installation */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of hosting plan (e.g., shared, VPS, dedicated) */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth of the plan */,
  "storage" TEXT /* Storage space of the plan */,
  "databases" INTEGER /* Number of databases included in the plan */,
  "email_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of email accounts included in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hosting_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan feature */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting plan offering the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_features_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting plan being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Pros of the hosting plan mentioned in the review */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Cons of the hosting plan mentioned in the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_reviews_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the promotion */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion expires */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Code required to redeem the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hosting_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider offering the coupon */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Code for the coupon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coupon */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the coupon */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon expires */,
  "minimum_purchase" REAL /* Minimum purchase required to redeem the coupon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupons_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hosting_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon being redeemed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user redeeming the coupon */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon was redeemed */,
  "redemption_status" TEXT /* Status of the redemption (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosting_provider_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the hosting provider */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received by the hosting provider */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hosting_provider_ratings_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hosting_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_provider" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_hosting_provider" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliates" (
  "affiliate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliate */,
  "affiliate_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliate */,
  "referral_link" TEXT /* Referral link for the affiliate */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate of the affiliate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliates_hosting_provider" (
  "affiliate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliate_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission */,
  "affiliate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate earning the commission */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hosting provider */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the commission */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the commission was earned */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the commission payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_affiliate_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliate_id") REFERENCES affiliates ("affiliate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hosting_providers ("provider_id")
)
